creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
We have a new mailing list, freebsd-tcltk; this PR is a request
	to update the documentation to reflect its existence.

Fix: As usual, I believe the following patch should be close.  Please
	feel free to exercise your usual editorial prerogatives.  (The
	patch is based on the docs as of r40155.)
How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
